texto: Most people, when they are looking for a spouse, are looking for a finished statue when they should be looking for a wonderful block of marble. Not so you can create the kind of person you want, but rather because you see what kind of person Jesus is making.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kathy Keller sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Most people, when they are looking for a spouse, are looking for a finished statue when they shou…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, christianity, marriage, útil em momentos de casamento e marriage.
